stemHtml: You are flying with an outside air temperature of -12°C and a TAS of 250 kts at FL150 through overcast NS clouds. What type and degree of icing is most probable?

options.a: Over flat terrain, away from fronts, moderate to severe mixed ice.
options.b: Over flat terrain, moderate hoar frost.
options.c: In clouds pushed up against the mountains, moderate to severe rime ice.
options.d: In clouds pushed up against the mountains, moderate to severe mixed ice.
